commit.name: Multi-Step Survey Form
commit.description: Multi-step form with validation, progress tracking, and review
commit.prompt:
Build a multi-step survey form with 4 steps:
- Step 1: Text inputs for name (required) and email (required, must be valid email format) with inline validation
- Step 2: Radio button group for satisfaction rating (1-5 scale with labels from props)
- Step 3: Checkbox group for feature interests (options from props)
- Step 4: Textarea for open-ended comments (optional, with character counter, max 500 chars)

Requirements:
- Progress bar at the top showing current step (e.g., "Step 2 of 4")
- Back/Next navigation buttons (Next disabled until required fields valid)
- Final review step showing all answers before submission
- Call props.onSubmit with all collected answers as a structured object
- All option labels and feature lists must come from props
- Use design system CSS variables for all styling

featureOptions.description: Available feature options for the checkbox step

satisfactionLabels.description: Labels for satisfaction rating (e.g., Very Unsatisfied to Very Satisfied)

submit.label: Submit Survey
submit.description: Called with all collected answers as a structured object

issues.description: Line 223: Array index out of bounds — props.satisfactionLabels[satisfaction as number - 1] will crash if satisfaction is empty string or 0, as it's initialized as '' and could be accessed before being set. Even though satisfaction is type-guarded, the array index calculation (satisfaction - 1) on an invalid satisfaction value could return negative index or exceed bounds.
issues.fix: Line 223: Array index out of bounds — props.satisfactionLabels[satisfaction as number - 1] will crash if satisfaction is empty string or 0, as it's initialized as '' and could be accessed before being set. Even though satisfaction is type-guarded, the array index calculation (satisfaction - 1) on an invalid satisfaction value could return negative index or exceed bounds.

Polish is hindered by missing hover/focus states and validation feedback styling on form inputs.

commit.name: Kanban Task Board
commit.description: Column-based task board with task cards and state management
commit.prompt:
Build a Kanban-style task board with 3 columns: To Do, In Progress, Done.

Each column:
- Has a header with column name and task count
- Contains a vertical list of task cards
- Has an "Add Task" button at the bottom

Each task card displays:
- Task title (editable on double-click or via edit button)
- Priority badge (low/medium/high with color coding from design tokens)
- Assignee avatar or initials
- Due date (if set)
- A move button or dropdown to move the task to another column

Requirements:
- Tasks can be moved between columns via move controls (buttons or select dropdown)
- New tasks start in "To Do" column
- "Add Task" shows an inline form with title input and priority selector
- Track total tasks and completed count in a summary bar at the top
- Initial tasks come from props; real-time updates from other team members arrive via stream
- Call the taskUpdate action when a task is moved, edited, or created
- Use design system CSS variables for all colors, spacing, and shadows

tasks.description: Array of tasks with id, title, priority (low/medium/high), assignee initials, column ID, and optional dueDate

columns.description: Column definitions: [{id: "todo", name: "To Do"}, {id: "in-progress", name: "In Progress"}, {id: "done", name: "Done"}]

taskUpdate.label: Task Updated
taskUpdate.description: Called when a task is moved, edited, or created. Payload: { action, taskId, data }

stream.description: Real-time task updates from other team members

taskChanged.description: A task was moved, edited, or created by another user — update it in the board

getBoardState.description: Current board state including any unsaved edits

commit.name: Onboarding Wizard
commit.description: Multi-step onboarding flow with step indicator and validation
commit.prompt:
Build a 3-step onboarding wizard. Steps:

Step 1 - Profile Setup:
- Name input (required)
- Email input (required, validate email format)
- Avatar selection (choose from 4 emoji avatars)

Step 2 - Preferences:
- Role selection (dropdown: Developer, Designer, Manager, Other)
- Notification toggle (email notifications on/off)
- Theme preference (light/dark toggle)

Step 3 - Review & Confirm:
- Summary of all selections from steps 1-2
- "Go Back" button to edit
- "Complete Setup" button to submit

Requirements:
- Step indicator at top showing current step (1/2/3) with progress bar
- Back/Next navigation (Next disabled until required fields valid)
- Smooth transition between steps
- Call props.onComplete with all collected data on final submit
- All initial values from props (for editing existing profile)
- Use design system CSS variables for all styling

initialProfile.description: Pre-filled profile data for editing (all fields optional)

avatarOptions.description: Available avatar emojis to choose from

roleOptions.description: Available role options for the dropdown

complete.label: Complete Setup
complete.description: Called with all profile data when user completes onboarding

issues.description: Avatar selection buttons lack aria-label or role attributes for screen reader users - emoji buttons should have descriptive labels like 'aria-label="Select avatar {emoji}"'
issues.fix: Avatar selection buttons lack aria-label or role attributes for screen reader users - emoji buttons should have descriptive labels like 'aria-label="Select avatar {emoji}"'

issues.description: Avatar selection buttons are not keyboard accessible - Clickable component boxes need proper role="button" and keyboard event handlers (Enter/Space keys)
issues.fix: Avatar selection buttons are not keyboard accessible - Clickable component boxes need proper role="button" and keyboard event handlers (Enter/Space keys)

issues.description: Toggle components lack aria-label to clarify their purpose - 'Email Notifications' and 'Dark Theme' toggles should have descriptive aria-labels for screen readers
issues.fix: Toggle components lack aria-label to clarify their purpose - 'Email Notifications' and 'Dark Theme' toggles should have descriptive aria-labels for screen readers

issues.description: Choose Avatar section label is Text component, not a proper <label> element - should use FormField wrapper or semantic label element for better form semantics
issues.fix: Choose Avatar section label is Text component, not a proper <label> element - should use FormField wrapper or semantic label element for better form semantics

issues.description: Missing aria-current or similar indicator for current step in progress bar - screen readers don't know which step is active
issues.fix: Missing aria-current or similar indicator for current step in progress bar - screen readers don't know which step is active

issues.description: Line 156-162: Avatar selection box uses inline style properties (fontSize, padding, borderRadius, border) that bypass design system — should use component props and design tokens
issues.fix: Line 156-162: Avatar selection box uses inline style properties (fontSize, padding, borderRadius, border) that bypass design system — should use component props and design tokens

issues.description: Line 163-165: hoverStyle object uses inline style with hardcoded background color reference — should leverage component's built-in hover states
issues.fix: Line 163-165: hoverStyle object uses inline style with hardcoded background color reference — should leverage component's built-in hover states

issues.description: Line 117: Transition property in inline style (cubic-bezier easing) — should use design system motion/animation tokens if available
issues.fix: Line 117: Transition property in inline style (cubic-bezier easing) — should use design system motion/animation tokens if available

issues.description: Inconsistent spacing in avatar selection (padding: 8) — should use standardized spacing token (var(--ggui-spacing-2) or similar)
issues.fix: Inconsistent spacing in avatar selection (padding: 8) — should use standardized spacing token (var(--ggui-spacing-2) or similar)

issues.description: Line 100, 146, 190, 202: Some color references use fallback hex values alongside CSS variables — should rely solely on var() tokens
issues.fix: Line 100, 146, 190, 202: Some color references use fallback hex values alongside CSS variables — should rely solely on var() tokens

evaluation.critique: The component has a solid structure with proper step management and responsive layout, but the source code is truncated mid-Toggle handler, making it incomplete. While it correctly uses design tokens for colors (var(--ggui-color-*)) and spacing via Stack/Row components, there are some inconsistencies: hardcoded padding values in Box styles (8px, 16px) instead of spacing tokens, and inline style objects that bypass the design system. The progress bar and avatar selection show good polish with transitions and hover states, but missing interactive feedback on Toggle and Select components.
